Sequence similarities: SIMILARITY: Belongs to the methyltransferase TylF/MycF family. {ECO:0000305}.
Catalytic activity: CATALYTIC ACTIVITY: Reaction=8-demethyl-8-(2,3-di-O-methyl-alpha-L-rhamnosyl)-tetracenomycin C + S-adenosyl-L-methionine = 8-demethyl-8-(2,3,4-tri-O-methyl-alpha-L-rhamnosyl)-tetracenomycin C + S-adenosyl-L-homocysteine + H(+); Xref=Rhea:RHEA:41548, ChEBI:CHEBI:15378, ChEBI:CHEBI:57856, ChEBI:CHEBI:59789, ChEBI:CHEBI:78286, ChEBI:CHEBI:78287; EC=2.1.1.307; Evidence={ECO:0000269|PubMed:11376004};
Function [CC]: FUNCTION: O-methyltransferase involved in the biosynthesis of the permethylated L-rhamnose moiety of elloramycin, an antitumor polyketide. Mediates the methylation of the hydroxy groups at the 4'-position after the sugar moiety has been attached to the aglycon. {ECO:0000269|PubMed:11376004}.
